our story

A single, unhurried place for hair, skin & body.

Lumé began with one idea — a place where the lighting is soft, the products are clean, and the people remember your name. Our licensed stylists, estheticians, and massage therapists work out of six private rooms, blending exacting technique with genuine, unhurried care.

6private rooms
4disciplines, one roof
100%licensed & insured

what we do

The menu, by ritual

01

Hair & Color

Precision cuts, ammonia-free color, dimensional balayage, and lived-in highlights shaped to how you actually wear your hair.

45 min – 3 hr
02

Skin & Facials

Tailored, results-driven facials, dermaplane, and brow & lash work — with a long, quiet finish in a private room.

30 – 60 min
03

Body & Massage

Deep-tissue and relaxation bodywork, hot stone, and full-body scrub & wrap with a licensed therapist.

60 – 90 min
04

Nails

Meticulous manicures and spa pedicures with clean, long-wear finishes — never rushed, never crowded.

30 – 50 min

Full menu & current pricing are kept up to date in online booking.

why lumé

A different kind of quiet

Clean by default

Low-tox, fragrance-considerate products throughout — the calm starts the moment you walk in.

Private rooms

Six quiet treatment rooms — no open floor, no rushing you out the door.

Licensed specialists

Every service performed by a state-licensed stylist, esthetician, or massage therapist.

One roof, one visit

Hair, skin, body, and nails coordinated into a single, seamless appointment.

how it works

From booking to bliss

1

Book

Reserve online in under a minute, or call us. Tell us what you're after and we'll match you to the right specialist.

2

Consult

Arrive to tea and a quick, honest consult so we can tailor the entire visit to you — no pressure, no upsell.

3

Unwind

Settle in and let us handle the rest. We'll rebook your next visit before you leave, if you'd like.

balayage signature facial deep-tissue massage hot stone balayage signature facial deep-tissue massage hot stone

inside lumé

The space & the work

good to know

Questions, answered

Do you take walk-ins?+

We love walk-ins when chairs are open, but booking online guarantees your time and your stylist.

Are your products low-tox?+

Yes — ammonia-free color and low-tox, fragrance-considerate lines throughout the house.

Hair and spa in one visit?+

Absolutely. Tell us when you book and we'll coordinate back-to-back rooms so it's seamless.

Do you offer consultations?+

Every visit starts with a quick, no-pressure consult. Color corrections get a dedicated one first.

What about parking?+

Street and garage parking are a short walk away in the Pearl; we'll point you to the closest.

Cancellation policy?+

Life happens — just give us 24 hours' notice so we can offer the spot to someone else.

service area
